policy.note: This guard validates the owner review packet entry point. It does not collect answers, apply decisions or publish files.

findings.message: Owner review packet status must be owner_review_packet_ready.
Packet must not record decisions.
Packet must not write session files.
Packet must not apply decisions.
Packet must not write public files.
Packet must not write public manifests.
Packet policy must keep public-ready after packet at 0.
Packet must reference a review-only passed data lane.
Question brief must be ready.
Question brief guard must pass.
Packet must expose the six-question owner brief.
Owner answer intake must still wait for owner input.
Owner answer intake guard must pass while pending owner input.
Packet must not contain filled answers.
Session edit plan must remain pending owner input.
Packet must not plan edits.
Source-root owner decision packet must be ready or satisfied.
Source-root owner decision packet must expose decision templates or a satisfied exact root.
Source-root owner decision packet must keep public-ready at 0.
Packet summary must keep public-ready at 0.
Packet review order must contain 6 items.
Review order item 1 must be in sequence.
Review order item 1 must be Owner Question Brief.
Owner Question Brief must require an accepted status.
Owner Question Brief must include a JSON source path.
Review order item 2 must be in sequence.
Review order item 2 must be Question Brief Guard.
Question Brief Guard must require an accepted status.
Question Brief Guard must include a JSON source path.
Review order item 3 must be in sequence.
Review order item 3 must be Owner Answer Intake.
Owner Answer Intake must require an accepted status.
Owner Answer Intake must include a JSON source path.
Review order item 4 must be in sequence.
Review order item 4 must be Owner Answer Intake Check.
Owner Answer Intake Check must require an accepted status.
Owner Answer Intake Check must include a JSON source path.
Review order item 5 must be in sequence.
Review order item 5 must be Session Edit Plan.
Session Edit Plan must require an accepted status.
Session Edit Plan must include a JSON source path.
Review order item 6 must be in sequence.
Review order item 6 must be Source Root Owner Decision Packet.
Source Root Owner Decision Packet must require an accepted status.
Source Root Owner Decision Packet must include a JSON source path.
Owner Question Brief JSON source must exist.
Owner Question Brief source status must match packet required status.
Question Brief Guard JSON source must exist.
Question Brief Guard source status must match packet required status.
Owner Answer Intake JSON source must exist.
Owner Answer Intake source status must match packet required status.
Owner Answer Intake Check JSON source must exist.
Owner Answer Intake Check source status must match packet required status.
Session Edit Plan JSON source must exist.
Session Edit Plan source status must match packet required status.
Source Root Owner Decision Packet JSON source must exist.
Source Root Owner Decision Packet source status must match packet required status.

next_actions: Use the owner review packet as the single entry point for the next owner review round.
Present questions without treating chat text as recorded decisions.
Transfer only explicit owner answers into the intake template, then rerun intake and session edit guards.
